# ESGov — Hong Kong Company Compliance Platform

> ESGov provides free PDF generators, compliance guides, and company secretarial resources for Hong Kong companies. All tools are free to use, no registration required.

## About

ESGov helps Hong Kong business owners handle company secretarial documents, compliance filings, and administrative tasks without expensive professional fees. Our focus is on accurate, up-to-date, Hong Kong-specific content.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://esgov.org/
- Blog: https://esgov.org/blog/
- Company Share Transfer: https://esgov.org/shareholder-transfer/
- Company Name Change: https://esgov.org/company-name-change/
- Audit Report Generator: https://esgov.org/audit-report-generator/
- Significant Controllers Register: https://esgov.org/significant-controllers-register/

## Popular Blog Posts

- 僱員補償保險完全指南: https://esgov.org/blog/香港公司僱員補償保險終極指南
- 暫繳稅終極指南 2026: https://esgov.org/blog/香港公司暫繳稅終極指南2026
- 有限公司合規 Checklist: https://esgov.org/blog/香港有限公司每年合規全面Checklist
- 公司秘書 DIY vs 服務比較: https://esgov.org/blog/香港公司秘書服務vsDIY終極比較
- Foreigner's Guide to HK Company Setup: https://esgov.org/blog/foreigner-guide-hk-company-setup

## Free Tools

All free, no registration needed:
- Sold Note / 股票轉讓書 PDF: https://esgov.org/sold-note-generator/
- Instrument of Transfer / 股份轉讓書 PDF: https://esgov.org/instrument-transfer-generator/
- Letter of Transferee / 承讓人聲明書 PDF: https://esgov.org/letter-of-transferee-generator/
- Special Resolution / 特別決議 PDF: https://esgov.org/company-name-change-generator/special-resolution/
- NNC2 / 更改公司名稱通知書 PDF: https://esgov.org/company-name-change-generator/nnc2/
- NAR1 / 週年申報表 PDF: https://esgov.org/nar1-generator/
- NSC1 / 股份配發申報書 PDF: https://esgov.org/nsc1-generator/
- Audit Report / 核數報告 PDF: https://esgov.org/audit-report-generator/

## Support

Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/esgov
